title: Improve readability of quadlet documentation
body:
## Description
The current quadlet documentation could be improved for better readability. The existing text in `podman-quadlet.1.md` needs formatting and clarity improvements.

## Current State
The documentation has formatting issues and could be clearer in explaining quadlet functionality.

## Proposed Solution
- Improve sentence structure and formatting
- Add proper spacing and punctuation
- Enhance clarity of explanations

## Files to be updated
- `docs/source/markdown/podman-quadlet.1.md`
